name: Heritage Bank & Trust
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank based in Columbia, Tennessee, offering personal and business banking, mortgages, and credit cards with a focus on rural Southern Middle Tennessee.
description_long:
Heritage Bank & Trust opened in March 2006 in Columbia, Tennessee, with a mission to serve the community and fuel economic growth in rural Southern Middle Tennessee. The bank operates as a traditional full-service financial institution regulated by the FDIC and holds NMLS# 478373. The company has grown to operate multiple locations across the region and recently celebrated its 20-year anniversary in 2026.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, online and mobile banking, credit cards with rewards and cash back options, and mortgage loans (including specialized products for farmland, manufactured homes, and lot loans). Business customers can access business checking, business credit cards, and treasury management services. The bank also operates Heritage Tax Services, LLC, a subsidiary providing personal and small business tax preparation services.

Heritage Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through explicit community commitment, documenting 1,021 volunteer hours in 2025, support for 29 school programs, and attendance at 95 community events. The bank was voted "Best Bank in Maury County" and emphasizes treating customers "as family" rather than as numbers. Their marketing and operations center on local relationship-building and rural community economic development rather than competing on digital innovation or national reach.

As a community bank, Heritage Bank & Trust operates with traditional banking infrastructure and geographic limitations. Customers seeking cutting-edge digital-only banking or those outside their service area would need to look elsewhere. The company's strength lies in personalized service and local decision-making for customers in rural Middle Tennessee who value relationship banking over convenience.
services: Online banking platform with bill pay and fund transfers
Mortgage loans (conventional, farmland, manufactured homes, lot loans)
Personal and business credit cards with rewards
Tax preparation services (Heritage Tax Services, LLC)
Fraud monitoring and identity theft protection resources
Account reconciliation and remote deposit capture
Card replacement and fraud reporting services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Specialized mortgage products for farmland, manufactured homes, and lot loans—uncommon among traditional banks
Dedicated fraud hotline (1-877-IDTHEFT) and identity theft resources available to customers
Established 20-year track record serving the same community since 2006
Voted 'Best Bank in Maury County' and documented community involvement with 1,021 volunteer hours in 2025
Online and mobile banking with bill pay, fund transfers, and remote deposits
In-house tax preparation subsidiary (Heritage Tax Services) for integrated financial planning
Credit card with unlimited points, cash back, and travel rewards
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to rural Southern Middle Tennessee—not accessible to customers outside this region
No mention of competitive interest rates or current APY on savings/checking accounts on website
No details on credit card APR, annual fees, rewards rates, or terms available from website content
Mobile app functionality described minimally; no information on digital banking features, security tools, or app ratings
Website indicates branch closures (Columbia branch closed for Mule Day April 11) suggesting limited operating flexibility

contact.address: 217 S James M Campbell Blvd, Columbia, TN 38401

best_for: Rural Small Tennessee residents who value relationship banking and personalized customer service over digital convenience
Small business owners and farmers in the Columbia/Maury County area seeking specialized agricultural or land-based lending
Homebuyers seeking mortgages for farmland, manufactured homes, or rural lot purchases in Middle Tennessee
Community-minded customers who want their banking to support local schools, nonprofits, and civic initiatives
diagnosis: Heritage Bank & Trust is best for customers in rural Southern Middle Tennessee who prioritize relationship banking, community connection, and specialized rural lending products over digital innovation or national convenience. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves the Columbia/Maury County area and is not accessible to those outside this region, making it unsuitable for customers seeking broader regional or national banking access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 217 S James M Campbell Blvd, Columbia, TN 38401
